title: Trace the Counter
description: Trace the execution and determine the final value of `counter` when called with `n = 4`.
hints: Trace each iteration: i=0 (+0), i=1 (-1), i=2 (+2), i=3 (-1).

title: Stack State Trace
description: What does `buffer.peek()` return after all push/pop operations complete?
hints: A stack is LIFO — trace each push/pop in order.

title: Recursive Call Trace
description: Trace the recursive calls and determine the return value of `compute(4)`.
hints: This is Fibonacci. compute(4) = compute(3) + compute(2).
